review_title: Perfect for small business and freelancers
description: Very good. It lacks a few features but they price they advertise is the price you pay. No hidden cost written in size 2 font. Support was quick to reply. This is the service I decided to use.
author: Kimberly H.
pros: It's easy to use, offers lots of information. You can have projects and put in the cost of the project so this tracks the hours and what the bill needs to be. It has both admin and user control panels and I got great support for my questions.
cons: It's lacking a few features. I'd like to be able to attach website urls to projects. It needs sortable reports which you can export.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: How is Insightful making companies more efficient?
description: I have loved it! I always say it is the best license our company has bought. It really helps me do my job faster and better, and provides real-time data that helps drive decision-making within our Operations team.
author: Angelo R.
pros: Insightful is easy, quick, and efficient to use. You can pull reports, data, and other insights about team members, attendance, and performance.
cons: Sometimes, it won't teach you how to navigate some parts of it. It would be to include more details and training on how to get some stuff done on the platform.

review_title: Horrible
description: Terrible product. Terrible support.
author: Yehuda G.
pros: Never got it to work properly so there is nothing positive i can say about it.
cons: Umm...the customer service number doesn't connect to anyone and then hangs you up. I have been using this service for about 3 months and have gotten nowhere.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Interface, Efficient Employee Monitoring
description: Insightful lets me know when my employees are working and what they are doing, making it easy to check reports.
author: Jacob G.
pros: I like Insightful because it has a nice interface and is easy to install. It makes it easy to check reports, and the price is good. It was easy to install on my employees' Mac computers, and it runs all the time in the background. It's easy and quick to look at reports and see what they're doing, including screenshots.
cons: I suppose maybe they could make a report that captures the hours worked productively in the most concise way. It's not a big deal, but you're asking for some given criticism.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Timezone issue then insightful would be perfect
description: good, I like that it's fast and reliable. The dev team did good job when it comes to performance and reliablility
author: Mahmoud Y.
pros: It's fast, reliable, and I use it everyday. It shows the agents login and logout time accurately and shows their activities
cons: The timezone management is difficult if managing teams from different timezones. Since they can set it to their timezone, and no way for me to know which timezone they're using

review_title: Good app, could be cheaper
description: it was a great easy experience to use. I wish their platform wasn't so expensive for all the premium features.
author: Sebastian M.
pros: The UI and ease of download. It was very quick and easy to install in other staff computers without further IT needed.
cons: Too many upgraded premium features. There are 5 or 6 additional features that whenever we try to access it requires a higher paid subscription.

review_title: Streamlining Daily Workflows and Tracking with Insightful”
description: Amazing!.I wish it can be adopted by more companies that provide remote jobs and make use of the features it provide.
author: Aryan K.
pros: I like how simple and minimalistic the UI is, makes it easy to maintain while working with different applications running at the same time in my PC.
cons: Everything is fine here but sometimes, I feel there should be more warnings and detailed descriptions of why my time is being considered unproductive so I can rectify the behaviour.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I am very happy I chose Insighful for my monitoring system, it has everything I need and want for a very small price.
description: The thing I like to must is the tech support, I am able to solve my problems in the website while I am on it.
author: Carlos T.
pros: I am able to track my employees and take screenshots of the computers without they even know. So I am aware of everything they are doing at all times.
cons: nothing, I need all the tools and all the options they offer. I will not change one single item of the entire web portal.

review_title: managing director
description: A very useful took for seeing what employees are working on at the moment and monitoring for personal use as well as offline.
author: Melissa C.
pros: The application provides great insight on monitoring employees. A very useful tool that can be used on a daily basis to monitor productivity. thanks
cons: The initial learning curve was a little difficult to get used to. And that the history of the screenshots cannot be stored longer than they are.

review_title: Insightful : A must have tool while working worldwide
description: I find Insightful very helpful since I can control my team within attendance, productivity and insights about their working hours. It provides real time information about my team and I can also llok for past dates or ranges like weeks months etc
author: Anabel O.
pros: It is an easy tool to use, user friendly. The reporting graphs and metrics have great filters and analysis tools. I don't have to download any document to review my teams activities and stats
cons: The fact that I cannot check my team filtering via shifts , it would be a great new feature. This new feature would be helfull to compare productivity trends in different shifts
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An essential tool for managing today's digital workforce
description: Workpuls has revolutionised how we are able to allow staff work remotely and still efficiently and how we are able to manage staff effectively while supervisors are also out of the office. The easy set up and web based application gives instant start up and it allows a gradual use of the sophisticated functionality which is built into the software. Software insight give a real view of how users are using the software assets and has enabled us to re-evaluate software product usage and license management of expensive softwares. The software insights also helps us identify training needs after evaluating how different staff use various softwares with less effectivity. Workpuls auditable data allows Client's confidence for hourly working.
author: Andy G.
pros: The ability to rapidly have practical insights into what all staff are engaging with and difficulties they experience in trying to get their job done. Responsive, patient and helpful online assistance.
cons: Improved reporting or access to how the data is diced up is needed. Another layer in Project & Task management. Ability to adjust punched time records through management authorisations (subjective for digital recording I know).

review_title: A tool that any business can use.
description: Best experience so far when it comes to the tools and the support that I got with the app. Would recommend to others as well.
author: Richard C.
pros: So when I first started the trial, it was easy to setup and use as well. It didn't took most of my time when I set it up. The support is so helpful as well when it comes to my questions if I need to know something about the app or if I need assistance with the app. I would recommend this to others as well.
cons: The task management feature. We don't use this much as it's time consuming when it comes to moving the task to certain status instead of having the status to be changed from the task list of for each individual employees. It would be cool if you allow employees that isn't marked as managers or adminds to be able to change the status of their tasks.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very good tool for overall employee management, especially in Software & IT setup
description: Overall experience was really very good. Software works like it should. It helped us improve productivity a lot. And the support from the company was also quite prompt and good.
author: Harshal P.
pros: I like the employee monitoring tracking to be the best part of this. And in addition, it has almost everything that you may need for a remote workforce too.
cons: Setting up what is productive and what is not, takes time initially. We have to wait till the software figures out things that employees do. But I guess, we need to give it data to learn anyway.

review_title: Easy-to-Use, but Shut Down automatically
description: Overall, it appears to be a useful app; however, I feel that it's necessary to place safety features to prevent it from shutting down without notification.
author: Jasmine M.
pros: Insightful is simple to use and understand. I liked that I was able to log on to the website through the app, and that I was able to see productivity in a easy-to-read format.
cons: Unfortunately, I had an issue where my project disappeared while I was working on it. The insightful app stopped recording my time and did not notify me that 1. it had stopped my time on its own, and 2. that the project had been unassigned. When it was time for me to take a break, I realized it had stopped timing long before I had noticed. I'm not exactly sure on how long I had been working prior to the app stopping, and will now have to estimate the time I spent on the project to be compensated appropriately.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Insightful is a Great Tool
description: It is a great tool to monitor your employees and keep them working at top productivity at all points and allows you to quickly right the ship before anything truly goes astray
author: Brian P.
pros: It accurately shows employee productivity and allows you to make decisions regarding their work habits and functions
cons: There are not many negatives. Sometimes it can go down or be non-responsive but that is few and far between

review_title: Insightful: Clarity at work, productivity with purpose.
description: Insightful is a productivity monitoring tool that helps track employee activity and time efficiently, but it requires careful implementation to address privacy concerns and ensure data is interpreted correctly.
author: Terei A.
pros: Insightful provides real-time visibility into app and website usage for better productivity tracking. It automates time tracking, reducing manual input and improving accuracy. The tool offers clear productivity reports and dashboards for performance insights. It supports remote work management effectively. Stealth mode allows for non-intrusive monitoring.
cons: There are features that are on the works, also, data and report may need to be tweaked to get the best result since not all are available.

review_title: Beginning to Learn how to use Insightful
description: Cannot give a true account of experience of Insightful as I am just starting to learn how to use the system.
author: Che' B.
pros: I do not know, as I am just getting started in using the system. The Insightful system may not be difficult to use but I am still learning.
cons: As of right now the inability to create an account to get started in using the system. There is too much difficulty in getting my account setup.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Insightful is and provides a great service
description: I cannot speak highly enough about the customer service provided. Our Customer Success Manager, [sensitive content hidden], is the best. She is very diligent and always willing to go above and beyond to assist us with any issues we may have. Also the IT department has always been very quick to assist with any issues that arise and will continue with follow up until issues is resolved.
author: Jill H.
pros: The various options for our managers to accurately view the productive time of our employees. In addition, with the improvements made over time, as an admin I am very appreciative of the ease to edits.
cons: I know this is something in the works, but I wish that there was a migration with our payroll provider available. It would make the the use of the two systems combined optimal.

review_title: Insightful is good and their customer service is highly appreciated
description: So far its absolutely very good. Problems do occur but having a good and very hands on customer service make everything easier
author: Wilson S.
pros: The customer service is responsive. They are very hands and fast to response on all your problems encountering
cons: sometimes its acting up, but so far its my 1st time to experience it and it was resve after so many interventions they have done
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Insightful rating
description: it is an amazing one and really recommendable, makes everything comfortable easy and doable, Great is the simple
author: Moaz E.
pros: The clarity and efficiency of saying it really makes it easy to check, track and make sure that you have everything under control.
cons: To be honest, I have not noticed anything negative, so sometimes technical errors occur but they are quickly resolved.

review_title: Great product for increasing productivity
author: Emin D.
pros: I just got started with it. It was easy to learn how it is set up. The support is friendly. It is easy to map the accounts as well.
cons: If something is messed up on our end. It is going to be hard to fix it. Like mapping a wrong account.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good platform for time tracking and viewing employee activity
description: Positive and helpful for tracking employee time and activities. We recently had and employee that was not working as they should and this allowed us to implement an improvement plan.
author: Sarah D.
pros: Screenshots are very helpful, they have allowed us to see what activities our employees were engaged in.
cons: Sometimes difficult to navigate the dashboard. There are a lot of functions that seem to do similar things

review_title: My experience with insightful
description: I like the whole experience with insightful, this tool help me a lot in my job to check all the employees work.
author: Arely G.
pros: I like how we can download the attendance file for wherever period that you need, most important you can check the productivity of each employee
cons: I don't like that you can't put notes on past dates on employees, some time the tool not refresh the attendance on real time.

review_title: Insightful is a tool (not a weapon)
description: Insightful has helped us improve working conditions for our employees, by reallocating work from those working over 100% to those working less than 60%. The shift in work helps with morale and engagement.
author: Jenny D.
pros: Insightful accurately captures use of company computers. We are able to see those who are working too much and those who have time to take on more work.
cons: The stigma behind using a tool like Insightful implies we're looking over everyone's shoulder, but in reality, it is a tool that can help make employees' work lives better, and more manageable.

review_title: Insightful - Full Insights at ease
description: Overall, Insightful has been really amazing to use. Anyone with a short amount of time can get a hang of Insightful.
author: Akshay N.
pros: The user interface is absolutely stunning and easy to understand. The user flow of Insightful is great too.
cons: I had noticed multiple scenarios in which the screenshot is not captured correctly. For ex: in case of dual screens and split screens, screenshot capturing is failing at times.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
